title.en: You hit the nail on the head! 딱 맞는 말이야! 정곡을 찔렀어!

description.en: When someone pinpoints the heart of the matter! Practice expressing agreement with "딱 맞는 말이야" and "정곡을 찔렀어".
description.ko: 상대방이 문제의 핵심을 정확하게 짚었을 때! 딱 맞는 말과 정곡을 찔렀다는 표현으로 깊이 공감해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Accuracy. Insight. Agreement. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 제가 오늘 우리 방송 녹음하면서 생각한 건데. 우리 방송이 왜 인기 있는지 알 것 같아요.
content.translation: John. I thought about this while recording today. I think I know why our show is popular.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh. what is it? I'm curious.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 한국어 리액션을 이렇게 상황별로 쉽게 알려주니까 외국인 친구들이 배우기 정말 좋잖아요. 그게 비결인 것 같아요.
content.translation: It is because we explain Korean reactions so easily for each situation. making it great for foreign friends to learn. I think that is the secret.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 하하. You hit the nail on the head! 딱 맞는 말이야. 저도 그게 우리 방송의 큰 매력이라고 생각해요!
content.translation: Haha. You hit the nail on the head! It is exactly right. I also think that is the great charm of our show!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 제 생각이 맞았네요. 제가 오늘 핵심을 제대로 짚었죠?
content.translation: As expected. my thought was right. I really pinpointed the core today. right?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Exactly! 정말 정곡을 찔렀어!
content.translation: Exactly! You really hit the nail on the head!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 딱 맞는 말이야. This is such a useful word when someone's guess is spot on.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방이 상황이나 문제의 핵심을 정확히 말했을 때 시원하게 써보세요.
content.translation: Right. Try using it coolly when someone correctly states the core of a situation or problem.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 딱 맞는 말이야.
content.translation: It is exactly right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 핵심을 제대로 짚었어 라는 말은 상대방이 가장 중요한 부분을  잘 찾아냈을 때 쓰는 말이에요.
content.translation: And 'Haek-sim-eul je-dae-ro jip-eot-eo' is what you say when someone finds the most important part well.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 핵심을 제대로 짚었어.
content.translation: You pinpointed the core.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What about 정곡을 찔렀어. It sounds more sharp.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 정곡을 찔렀어 라는 표현은 상대방이 미처 생각하지 못한 예리한 부분을 딱 말했을 때 써요.
content.translation: Haha. The expression 'Jeong-gog-eul jjilleot-eo' is used when someone says something sharp that you hadn't even thought of.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm complaining that I don't have enough time to exercise lately.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 시간이 없는 게 아니라 사실 아침에 늦게 일어나서 그런 거 아니에요?
content.translation: John. it is not that you don't have time. is it actually because you wake up late in the morning?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 정곡을 찔렀어! 사실 아침에 휴대폰 보느라 늦게 일어나긴 해요.
content.translation: Haha. You hit the nail on the head! Actually. I do wake up late because I'm looking at my phone.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 제가 오늘 핵심을 제대로 짚었네요. 정말 운동하고 싶으면 아침에 일찍 일어나야죠!
content.translation: I pinpointed the core correctly today. If you really want to exercise. you should wake up early!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 딱 맞는 말이야. 내일부터는 정말 일찍 일어날게요.
content.translation: That is exactly right. I will really wake up early starting tomorrow.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그 결심 꼭 지켜야 해요!
content.translation: Haha. You must keep that resolution!

content.speaker: John
content.text: These reactions are so powerful when someone gives you a great insight.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방의 예리한 관찰력에 놀랐을 때 오늘 배운 표현들로 리액션해 보세요!
content.translation: Right. When you are surprised by someone's sharp observation skills. react with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our spot on reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 딱 맞는 말이야!
content.translation: Exactly right!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 핵심을 제대로 짚었어!
content.translation: You pinpointed the core!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 정곡을 찔렀어!
content.translation: You hit the nail on the head!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그 말이 정답이야!
content.translation: Those words are the correct answer!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아주 정확해!
content.translation: Very accurate!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가의 마음을 딱 맞히는 통찰력 있는 하루 되세요!
content.translation: I hope you all have an insightful day where you guess someone's heart perfectly!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 이 신발은 제 발에 딱 맞아요. (These shoes fit my feet perfectly.)
이번 보고서의 핵심은 무엇인가요? (What is the core of this report?)
당신은 항상 문제의 핵심을 잘 짚네요. (You always pinpoint the core of the problem well.)
그의 질문은 정곡을 찔렀습니다. (His question hit the nail on the head.)
바늘이 손가락을 찔렀어요. (The needle poked my finger.)
요리를 잘하는 비결이 뭐예요? (What is the secret to being good at cooking?)
